entry.title: Re: Excited to be a part of the community
entry.content: YES. A large part of my studies revolve around SAP.

entry.title: Re: retire Fully Depreciated Asset by abavn
entry.content: It is currently at 11. Even if I change it to something else, it's the same.

entry.title: Re: How do I create an import declaration in GTS when ven...
entry.content: Is the Goods Supplier (WL) Partner function an option? You could put partner function on the PO and inbound delivery. The LF vendor would still be US. In GTS, you can use some default rules that map the WL or the LF (sequencing) to be the Importer. Not sure if that meets your scenario, but I have done this similarly when the vendor on the PO is in a different country than the physical import.

entry.title: Re: July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
@qmacro Hello DJ,

Is there a way we could install ngrok with BAS terminal?

 

Thanks a lot for the guidance all around. With Gratitudes, Sathya

entry.title: Re: How to add new column on view setting on app
entry.content:
Dear @Arielgwyn 

Would you please find more detaisls from blog below?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/extending-business-processes-with-product-footprints-using-the-key-user/ba-p/13533350

entry.title: 'Bad Certificate' error when integrating SAP DMC to OPC UA simulator via production connector
entry.content:
We are trying to integrate SAP DMC to Integration Objects OPC UA server simulator via Production Connector. But while trying to deploy the tags, it throws an error that the certificate is bad. Initially, we were using plant connectivity and a different OPC simulator(Matrikon), now we recently shifted to Production Connector and were trying to check if the tags were fetched using an alternative OPC simulator. Can anyone help me identify what configuration changes are needed in the OPC UA simulator settings or the DMC? Attaching the screenshot of both configurations. 

This is the error that we are getting in the logs.

entry.title: External number range for materials
entry.content:
I am working on a project on S4HANA 2023 SP01. My client has a requirement to have external number range assigned to a specific material type and it should be possible to enter the following numbers:

  • Only numbers - for example 1234;
  • Numbers and special symbols - for example 170.70
  • Alphabetic characters - for example ABCD

If we create a number range 0 - ZZZZ, it is possible to create materials with numbers and special symbols and alphabetic characters. However when we try to enter only numbers the system gives an error “With this material type, ext. material no. must not contain only numbers”.

It seems there is no standard way to do the above.

We have checked the user exists in enhancement MGA00002 and MGA00003 and it seems we cannot use these to achieve our goal - it is always needed to have letters as pre-fix or suffix.

Do you know if there is some other UE / enhancement that we can use to fulfil our requirement?

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content: Great insights!

entry.title: Re: Getting 'Internal Server Error' while calling the SCT...
entry.content: There was some server issue. The issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: SAC Script needed to retrive the selected values of a...
entry.content: use for loop-> for (var i=0; i < sel.length; i++){ newvar.push(sel[i])}

entry.title: Re: Capture fright G/l account in MIRO.
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

 

In our current process,
the Purchase team generates Purchase Orders (POs) for materials without including the estimated freight charges. Consequently, the actual freight charges, which are billed by the vendor in tax invoice often result in a discrepancy between the PO value and the vendor invoice.

To reconcile this difference, the Finance team records the freight amount in a General Ledger (GL) account during the MIRO transaction. However, this method does not allocate the freight cost directly to the material cost.

so could you help me to solve this situation it really appreciated to me.

entry.title: I am configuring BRF+ Output and i would need help maintaining output relevance as condition records
entry.content:
I am configuring BRF+ Output and I would need help with maintaining output relevance as condition records for the users where some users might require email and some Print.

Like we maintain condition records in VV11 with Key Combinations do we have anything  which is easy to maintain and monitoring them.

entry.title: SAP Solution Manager(Solman) Installation case separate for SV-SMG-INS team
entry.content:
How to make sure have install SAP Solution Manager in environment?
SAP Support install SAP Solution Manager


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Solution Manager(Solman) Installation case separa...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Are you installing SAP Solution Manager or have you already installed and want to know how to use SAP Solution Manager?
Could you please refer to the Mater guide of SAP Solution Manager?
https://help.sap.com/doc/0cf686fdc18643f29fdf37301db40d1c/7.2.19/en-US/loioe74b5fca3d284f4b8b3563e5ddf7224f_e74b5fca3d284f4b8b3563e5ddf7224f.pdf
-->2.4 Installation of SAP Solution Manager

Best regards,
Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Applying the pipeline concept for an integration scenario in general
entry.content:
@Benko via the Partner Directory API, this is explained here https://help.sap.com/docs/MIGRATION_GUIDE_PO/90c8ad90cb684ee5979856093efe7462/9ec7d2dce72d423abff80543f11b2091.html

as heads up, we plan to support the automatic generation of Pipeline concept artifacts such as the scenario-specific flows and the Partner Directory entries in the migration tool. Furthermore, we plan to provide a UI for the Partner Directory where you then could upload XSLTs as well.

Alex

entry.title: Re: Free-hand SQL Webi Promotion to other server, Connect...
entry.content: Hi, thanks, yes I tried that, but thought it had not worked as the query was the same query number so I thought it had not changed. But on closer inspection, the source has changed, so both queries are now same source. I was assuming it would have swapped queries in from end. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Publish/Activate an oData V4 Service Group in SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

how do we move the published odata v4 service from one client to another client.

The changes are not locked into any transport.

Not able to Publish in 300 client locally as well.

Please Suggest.

Thanks,

Ahamed

entry.title: Re: Checking Retry Count at Runtime in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: For the pipeline concept we have implemented a retry handling, you may use this as template, check out in any generic flow at https://hub.sap.com/package/PIPipelineGenericIntegrationFlows/integrationflow, for Kafka not sure which header or property is set, but you may find out if switching on the trace, I noticed from your screenshot that trace is switched on already, weren't you able to find out from the trace?

entry.title: Hello CAP community, Can you please suggest a correct way to implement same logic as LIKE operator.
entry.content:
entity orderDetails @(restrict: [
                        { grant: ['READ'], to: 'Viewer', where: 'companyCode LIKE '%RW%''},
                        { grant: ['WRITE'], to: 'Admin' }
                        ]) as projection on da.orderDetails ;
}

entry.title: Adobe forms: background image floating all Subforms
entry.content:
I would like to put an image to the background to fit all page (like a watermark) and it should not fit into one subform and destroy the layout, but it should occur on the whole page in the background of all subforms.

I'm using already the function "send to background" but it still stays in one subform (cell).

Thank you very much in advance,

Best Regards,
Marek

entry.title: Discover AI Innovations: Beta Testing AI Applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
At SAP, we're dedicated to delivering the best possible experience for our customers. That's why we're inviting you to participate in our Beta Testing Program, where you can provide valuable feedback on new features and help us refine them before their official release.

By taking part in beta testing, you'll have the opportunity to explore the latest functionality before it's available to the wider customer base, and your input can directly impact the quality and usability of the features.

With SAP's continuous innovation in AI technology, we are excited to announce that our upcoming 2408 release will introduce a wide array of AI-related applications available for Beta testing. This provides you with an early opportunity to experience and engage with the latest innovations firsthand.

Finance

AI-Assisted Configuration for US Tax Jurisdictions

Utilize AI for extracting key information from natural language sentences or given Excel files, and automatically configure jurisdiction-based tax settings. This streamlines tax configuration processes, reduces manual errors, and enhances operational efficiency through natural language interaction and a more intuitive user interface, leading to a modernized and cost-effective onboarding experience.

Click to view the demo video

AI-Assisted Error Resolution

AFC's AI-Assisted Error Resolution effectively interprets technical error messages and context to provide understandable explanations and step-by-step resolution guides, saving time and preventing delays during the financial close process. It also empowers end-users to independently mitigate common error situations, reducing pressure and effort while modernizing the error resolution experience.

Click to view the demo video

AI-Assisted Financial Business Insights

Utilize a "Virtual Analyst" to provide instant explanation and summarization of insights in natural language and automate the discovery of significant data in Review Booklets for Cost Center. With AI, analyze and highlight data dependencies and suggest actionable insights presented in intuitive visualizations and plain language, facilitating management reporting and commentary.

Click to view the demo video

AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys

Sales

Assisted Object Creation of Customer Return

Assisted Object Creation of Custom Returns feature utilizes AI to assist in the creation of return orders. The intelligent User Interface provides recommendations for recurring input values, ranked by probability, allowing the user to easily select from the offered recommendations, thereby streamlining the input process.

Project Management

Resource Management: Intelligent Matching of Employees to Projects

The feature of advanced skill match assists in finding skilled employees for resource requests. It considers similar skills to those requested and maintained in the candidate's profile, and presents a matching candidate list to the resource manager. This streamlines the process of finding the right candidates for resource requests.

User Experience

AI-Assisted Smart Summarization

Get summarizations for your object pages using SAP Fiori elements apps to facilitate decision making. Translate the summarization into languages other than your default language, and use it as a starting point for follow-ups. Easily share the summarization in your preferred solution and enjoy beta testing at no additional license cost.

AI-Assisted Easy Filter

Users can input filter criteria in natural language to obtain filter results in SAP Fiori elements-based list report applications. Verify the applied filter values in your classical filter experience and refine the filters as needed. Utilize the filtering experience that best suits your needs.

For more information, see: Get Involved Early

Register and experience the latest AI features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and influence upcoming AI developments.

entry.title: Re: "Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer"
entry.content: Hello, did you solve this issue?

entry.title: Authorizations – Restrictions for Production Orders Based on Master Data
entry.content:
Hello,

There is requirement to restrict the access to BOMs, planning of materials and production orders for a portion of the portfolio within one plant for users. System is S/4 HANA public cloud.

We manage to set up restriction for BOMs with field BEGRU_STLAN  and to planning data with PP_MRP_CTRLR  (except for MD04 tree for which we got answer that it is not possible to restrict order tree within one plant).

We can make additional restriction according to order type with field AUFART_WERKS  and we can only create or see only orders of designated type.

We can still go to Create production order (CO01) app and create orders for materials with different MRP controllers with this order type, so order type is nice to have, but not solution.

What is needed, is to restrict opening or changing production orders according to eg. Production supervisor (MARC-FEVOR)  or maybe MRP controller related to material… or by some field that can be read from material, production version etc.

Do you maybe have some suggestion for this matter?

Thank you in advance,

Kristina.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Srikanth,

thanks. I don't have a global account in SAP BTP Cockpit. I get this when I go to "Access Feature Set B global accounts at https://cockpit.btp.cloud.sap" from Home:

and this when I go to "Switch Global Account" from Trial Account Home:

In the SAP BTP Cockpit under Trial Account, Services, Instances and Subscriptions, I have this ABAP instance:

I've used this instance's service key to connect to BTP in the ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse. However, I do not get the service as an option when configuring the Data Source and Service in SAP Business Apllication Studio.

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: OData Query: Filter on Hierarchy node is not working filterable=false
entry.content:
Hello,

according to Parameter Handling Hierarchy  it is possible to Filter on Hierarchy nodes.

I tried the following

Hierarchy is active (i.e $select contains _NodeID): Subtree selection => The reply contains all nodes (including leaves) below the filtered node. It is normally not possible to filter the _NodeID property. This is possible however if the query has a hierarchy node variable that was modeled for the hierarchy.

I created an Bex Query for 0PROFIT_CTR with an Hierarchyvariable  + NodeVariable . I used the following URL:  (HIERARCHYVAR='HIERARCHY1',HIERNODEVAR='')/Results$select=0PROFIT_CTR_N&$filter=0PROFIT_CTR_N eq 'HIER_NODE:Europe'

The result: Error Message: BW_BICS_EQ/033 --> Filter on 0PROFIT_CTR_N not supported

i can see filterable=false in metadata for 0PROFIT_CTR_N

How can we resolve this?

Kind regards 

 

-

entry.title: Anybody else getting a login-page via Firefox for "SAP Community PROD Baseline"?
entry.content:
Hi All!

Since Monday, I get an unexpected login-page when I try to access any of the following links via Firefox:

https://groups.community.sap.com
https://community.sap.com
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/interesting-stuff-you-find-when-running-s-4hana-readiness-checks/bc-p/13437786#M57898 (as a random example for a blog post which should be publicly accessible)

The login-page mentions "SAP Community PROD Baseline" which looks a bit weird:

This is not happening when I access the links via Chrome or Edge or Firefox on my iPad. I already deleted Cookies & Cache in Firefox yesterday, but it's happening again today. I can then login with my credentials as usual, but there shouldn't really be any need to login to just see and read the public content available in SAP Community.

Is anybody else seeing this?

Thanks much and cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: Re: Explore SAP BW/4HANA Learning: Your Ultimate Guide
entry.content:
Hi Johann - great summary of existing BW/4HANA learning sources!
Do these require a SAP Learning Hub subscription or are those available to all?
Thank you
Frank

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content: Virtual Event helps... I will be able to actively participate. Thanks for arranging the virtual event @Anne_Lenhardt

entry.title: Re: Explore SAP BW/4HANA Learning: Your Ultimate Guide
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

they are free accessible for all without any subscriptions apart from the certification. 

Best

Johann

entry.title: Re: InfoObject Assignment is missing in SAP BW/4HANA for...
entry.content:
Hi,

The field you mark is not really required for the lookup:

You must select the InfoObject you want to read from as lookup InfoObject. And in the second step you choose the field/InfoObject (attribute) from the looked-up InfoObject.

Best Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: RFR in SAP RAR
entry.content:
Hi @vijaymanikandan 

We are trying to set-up a system where in we want to perform a future cancellation & future finalization date, observation - Upon putting future cancellation date on SO, the POB takes that as finalization date and is completed now, what is the use of program FARR_POB_CANCELLATION?

entry.title: Re: RFR in SAP RAR
entry.content: @playerslayer

entry.title: Re: How to run full stack cap project locally with callin...
entry.content:
This document should provide you with the steps to do local testing with connectivity to external systems via destinations: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#connect-to-remote-services-locally

If you still face issues and find that either the routes pointing to local oData services or routes pointing to destinations work, but not both at the same time, you should have a look at how the routes and their relative paths are defined.

entry.title: Packaging specification long text upload in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Is there any way to mass upload/change/create the packaging specification long text? There is no option to achieve it by using /SCWM/IPU (there is no text field in the file structure).

I was trying with LSMW (seems to be not possible by recording becasue /SCWM/PACKSPEC has table control objects. This text is saved in SAPScript table STXH.

I wonder if someone had similar requirement?

Thank you in advance,

Best Regards,
Marek

entry.title: Re: Financial Statements from SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi again,

T-code F.01 is OK.

Choose the tab in the middle:

 

Anyway, when you start the transaction it will start, as you see in your attached screenshot, with the Tab "Further Selections".


There are 3 tabs, now choose the one in the middle (unfortunately your screenshot is in Japanese Language which Í can't read), it's called "Special evaluations":



In the first field open for entries "Balance sheet type" you can choose 4 different methods:

If you put the cursor into the desired field and press F4 then you all the available options., see screenshot abobe.

If you press instead F1 in that field you get a help text will be dissplayed:

Now you can play around with the different Balances Sheet Types.

Probably Type 2 is the one for your problem, but also Typ 3 is helpul if you want only for P+L accounts the monthly figures.

If you log on into SAP by choosing "English" as langauge you will get the same screen as in my example. Then it would be easier understand for everybody.

Choose here EN when loggong on:

entry.title: Re: Step-by-step Guide to Set Up Inbound Client Certificate Authentication, Cloud Foundry Environmen
entry.content:
I followed step by step but I obtain 401 Unauthorized

I tried to open the certificate, I see three sections:
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
.
.
-----END CERTIFICATE-----
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
.
.
-----END CERTIFICATE-----
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
.
.
-----END CERTIFICATE-----

but, if I open it I see:
"unable to find the certificate authority"

is it right?
Ant suggestion about my issue?

I's like it doesn't see the chain

Thanks a lot

Mario

.

entry.title: Re: BTP FinOps: Keeping Track of your Credits
entry.content:
Hi @samiksarkar 

Yes, this is related to the SAC part: if SAC is not available the 'Technical Allocation Dashboard' will not work. For this reason we provide 2 separate end-user roles that you can assign to users: "~btprc.cpkg_access_role" and "~btprc.cpkg_sac_role". If SAC is not used you should only assign the first role, so that the UI menu options relating to SAC are not visible.

entry.title: Question: Read Parameters From Each POD and Custom Plug-in
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'm a newbie who just started SAP DM. I registered and added few custom UI plug-ins developed with VS Code on the POD as a pop-up. The plugins can specify and import the data which they need via API from DMC, but I haven't succeeded to make information-interaction between the plugins and the POD yet.


Question:

 

1. Can the plug-in receive(read) data such as the number, resource, and quantity of the selected SFC of the POD as a parameter and display it on the plug-in page? I would like to spread POD selected SFC's information on the custom UI plug-ins.


2. Conversely, can the values in the custom plug-in be used in POD or PPD? For example, POD message, etc..


How can POD and external UI plugins transit data to each other? When I put the plug in on a Production Process Design, in configuration of it, it wasn't able to input any parameters. 

 

If there is a way to do, please explain it easily.

SAP Digital Manufacturing 

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Be Authentic, Comfortable and Interview the Interviewer 🧑🏻‍💻
entry.content:
Hi Kunal , 

Thanks for sharing these valuable insights.

Regards,

entry.title: Take-on of assets via AS91, accumulated depreciation is read only
entry.content:
Hi experts

What is preventing us from capturing accumulated depreciation via AS91?

We are attempting to take on historic assets into the fixed asset register via AS91, but when we do, the accumulated depreciation field is greyed out.

If we use "Ord. Dep. Posted", the value does not reflect on the created asset (planned or posted).

How do we capture historic accumulated depreciation of a take on asset?

entry.title: Re: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with...

entry.title: BOM not displaying materials corresponding to characteristic values in class type 200
entry.content: I created a super BOM with items of type k, classified as 200, but why is there a component in the BOM line item details in the class recurrence that you have, while the others are not displayed.

entry.title: Re: #SAC Dynamic percentage calculation in table
entry.content: Hi William, thank you for the support, can you show me in how should I do with some examples in detail? Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: Is an add-on needed to upload files to SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello,

this depends on the what kind of file is required to be uploaded or for which Process such file upload is needed.

In general ByDesign offer excel add-in to upload certain files ( or import the documents in the system) or system also allows direct uploads as well. such features are already included in byDesign and does not requrie additional purchase of excela add-in.

 

Thanks,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: iOS Building Error
entry.content: Hi @beapasch . can you help me?. I'm facing this issue. thank you.

entry.title: Re: Earn Credly Badges with Free SAP Learning Journey📚
entry.content: Thanks, very helpful blog!

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud script
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am using SAP SAC on BW Live. My Source is a Bex query with 2 structures, Key figure structure (Columns) and Non-Key Figure Structure (Rows). I have a table with (Row/Column) described above and a Numeric Point (KPI) that needs to show the required row value when the table row is clicked. Since using a structure for (rows) I cannot use Linked analysis as it does not understand the context. (Screenshot below) Table to the right and KPI on the left.

 

I am trying to use script to get selected Key per row in the table without success. My result is the Key of the structure, I m not able to get the keys for the objects in the structure. Like listed below.

 

I get that by doing the following.

 

The issue I have is trying to use script to get selected Key per row in the table. I have tried different combinations of the script below without success.

 

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content: @MioYasutake if the backend APIs have their own authentication requirements (roles), then these need to be assigned to the user as you would do anyway on the provider account.

entry.title: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content: We have installed SAP Personas and did parameter settings but not getting option to create flavours.

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content:
Hi,

I found that if I assign the script "Nonconformances at Current Operation" to the VARNISH step and "Nothing Nonconformances at Current Operation" to the CAB step, both go to the VARNISH step. Conversely, if I assign the script "Nonconformances at Current Operation" to the CAB step and "Nothing Nonconformances at Current Operation" to the VARNISH step, both go to the CAB step. This means that depending on the "FALSE" value, only the "Nonconformances at Current Operation" is taken into account.

How to access technical support?

Regards

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content: @fabianorosa both provider and consumer subaccounts must be on same IDP. When the user is already authenticated in Work Zone, and accesses an application which is routed to the provider subaccount, the application can access the existing user session and authenticate.

entry.title: Re: CDS view entities are feature complete, Part lll: Differences
entry.content:
Hello Andrea,

I wonder what is the best approach to create CDS View entities for analytic data extraction e.g. SAP BW/4?. Can you point out some differences for CDS View entities for Analytic Data extraction e.g. from S/4 to BW4Hana

We used in the past CDS Views and switched now to CDS View Entities as the others are marked as oboslete. However for data extraction the annotation data Extractio needs to be entered and set to enabled such like:

@Analytics:{dataCategory:#DIMENSION ,
            dataExtraction.enabled:true}

However the compiler throws a warning that data extraction for CDS View entity not possible [Analytics].

But when we are creating the data source and data flow in BW4, we realize extraction is indeed possible. So we are happy with the result, but still having this warning there remain the doubt if we are doing the right thing to be future proof for any further SAP releases.

Do you have some comments on that?

Many thanks,

Andreas

entry.title: Does oData V4 under ECC 750 support Lambda Operators for "Member Access Expressions" ?
entry.content:
OData defines two operators "any" and "all" that evaluate a Boolean expression on a collection. They can work on either collection properties or collection of entities. 

Now I wanted to do the same stuff like here in the blog of @Andre_Fischer with Material (MaterialGeneral - MARA to MaterialSales - MVKE)

OData V4 code based implementation - Overview - SAP Community

I tried for example this oData Call:

 

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/z_material/default/sap/z_material/0001/MaterialGeneral?$filter=_Sales/any(d:d/Salesorganization eq '0100')

 

But then i get the following error in SAP Gateway, that it can not generate the open sql where clause:

In note 2305033 I find some infos, but it is not totally clear for me.

In debugging I think I found the soulution (only unary and binary nodes are supported and not member access which is the case in my example):

 

I set up navigation properties etc, all things like $expand, $select and so work quite well. 

Am I right that this is not supported under ECC 750 and maybe under S4/HANA it is?

If not can i do some special ABAP implementation in my data provider class? Or should I direct start filtering from the MaterialSales entity, but then I can also setup navigation to MaterialGeneral and expand it, but then the cardinality is not as I prefer, because MaterialGeneral should be once in the response and MaterialSales can have multiple cases (for every salesorganization): MaterialGeneral 1 ... many MaterialSales 

Thank you,

best regards, Raphael

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content: Go to support.sap.com, and there follow "Get support" link.

entry.title: create product warehouse master by BAPI
entry.content: As IDOC_INPUT_PRDAPS_SAVEMULTI2 may not be used anymore on S/4 systems due to SYSTEM_ABAP_ACCESS_DENIED error what is a way to automatically create product master data, especially the warehouse master data for embedded EWM?

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content: This is so helpful , so many clients just don’t know where to start a fantastic read.

entry.title: Re: Extend CDS View with a new field and ValueHelp
entry.content: Hi, is there a solution for this issue? I need to implement the same solution but it is not work

entry.title: Re: Product group default to "2" when using unplanned ser...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for reaching out! 

In SAP S/4HANA, the product type group is determined by the material type of the material or service you are using. For lean services, when you are inputting unplanned services, the system defaults the product type group to ‘1’ for Material. This is standard system behavior and cannot be changed automatically to ‘2’. You would need to manually change this each time.

Kind Regards, 

Roxana

entry.title: Re: how to know the requester Department for material res...
entry.content: I think we can make goods recipient field mandatory and will be as a drop list by department

entry.title: Re: Everything You Need to Know About “Cumulative Sum” in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all, 

my customer is analyzing its vendors. They want to answer questions like: From my top 5 vendors (in terms of quantity) I get 50% of my total inventory. 

Therefore, they need to 1) rank their vendors in terms of quantity, 2) calculate the cumulative sum along this ranking and 3) calculate running percentages of the cumulative sum / total quantity. 

I can use the calculations in a table to do 1) and 2) but I cannot reuse these calculations in other charts. Can you think of a way to solve this issue?

entry.title: how to display Annual perks /127 in Form24Q - PC00_M40_F24Q report?
entry.content: /127 is generated in Payroll, however I do not see perks in Form 24 Q for generating 4th Quarter.

entry.title: Re: HANA Vector Engine and LangChain
entry.content:
Hi @martagolabek ,

Thanks for asking. The code fragments are indeed a bit oversimplified to focus on the main aspect.

The “ConversationalRetrievalChain” can maintain a chat history, which I intended not to use here. The simplest way would be to pass an empty array as chat history to the “invoke” call:

answer = qa_chain.invoke({"question": "How can I use CORS in CAP?" , "chat_history": []})

An alternative would be to pass an instance of “ConversationBufferMemory” to the “ConversationalRetrievalChain”:

memory = ConversationBufferMemory(memory_key="chat_history", output_key='answer', return_messages=True)

...

qa_chain = ConversationalRetrievalChain.from_llm(
    llm=gen_ai_hub.proxy.langchain.ChatOpenAI(proxy_model_name="gpt-4"),
    memory=memory,
    vectordb.as_retriever(search_kwargs={'k': 20}),
    combine_docs_chain_kwargs={'prompt': PROMPT})

I will adapt the blog content accordingly.

entry.title: How to correct invalid time dependent MD in SAP BW
entry.content:
Issue :

  • In 0MAT_PLANT incorrect data loaded for Time Dependent master data .        

        

Reason :

  • When loading master data if we select below mentioned checkbox then it will consider as new record and it will create one new wrong entry in Q table

         

Resolution :

  • Execute RSDMD_CHECKPRG_ALL program to correct "From Date" for errored record 
    • First execute RSDMD_CHECKPRG_ALL program in check mode so that you will come to know that how many records have issue in data as per below screen shot :

               

    • Once you get list of Material and Plant which is in error you will get list then execute the same program to repaire the data.
    • So once you executed above program in repaire mode then you will see "from date" is adjusted properly.

                 

  • Then create self loop transformation for 0MAT_PLANT to update releavent attributes.
    • Write a code in end routine ( ABAP / AMDP ) in newly created transformation in such away that whatever next future records is available we need to set same attributes for errored record. ( This may vary based on business )
    • So in this example i need to show in ZVSSTA_TD = Z1 & ZORDTO_TD = Y for errored record.
    • When i executed self loop DTP for newly created transformation i can able to see below output which we were expecting.

entry.title: Re: Unreadable characters in J2EE configtool
entry.content: Thanks for the hint. But this is a workaround, not a solution...

entry.title: Re: Unreadable characters in J2EE configtool
entry.content: Thanks for the hint. But this is a workaround, not a solution...

entry.title: S/4 HANA DATABASE - SYSTEM USER - Best practices says to deactivate SYSTEM ID
entry.content:
S/4 HANA DATABASE - SYSTEM USER - Best practices says to deactivate SYSTEM ID

Wanted to Understand how many application Owners after installing HANA DB using SYSTEM ID are deactivating it. Or is it being used as a shared account by Basis Team? IS it being logged and monitored if its active. 

As the most powerful database user, SYSTEM is not intended for use in production systems. Use it to create lesser privileged users for particular purposes and then deactivate it.

Deactivate the SYSTEM User | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Finding the G/L Account Not Used field
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to create a custom Data Model using the data source G/L Account, but with a condition that is ignoring the accounts with "G/L Account Not Used" as "Yes".
From my understanding, the indicator "G/L Account Not Used" is a part of another field called "Implementation Status". I have been trying to associate with another CDS Views such as I_GLAcctInCOAImplementStat and I_GLAcctInCoCodeImplementStat but they do not allow it.
Are there any other ways to get this field? Or is the field I'm looking for written as another name?

Many thanks

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Packaging specification long text upload
entry.content:
Hi

Have a look at BAPI_BUS1077_CHANGE. Long text can be provided in table IDENT_LONGTEXT. Don't forget to set FLG_IDENT_LONGTEXT. Also, take note of SAP note SAP note 3450174

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales(5D2) - IC Supplier Invoice not created but no error
entry.content: Hi there, you need to release the Intercompany Billing document to FI first. Use app "Change billing document" and look for "Release to FI". afterwards the supplier invoice is created by VCM. Hope that helps. Thanks and regards B

entry.title: Re: Adaptation of Manage Purchase Order at Purchase Order...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for reaching out! 

Assuming you created the custom field under the context business context of purchase document item MM_PURDOC_ITEM, then if you go under user interfaces tab of the custom field app, then you will be able to enable the usage for "Manage purchase order" (MM_PUR_PO_MAINT_V2_SRV).

Kind Regards, 

Roxana

entry.title: Re: latest Version of SAP CML
entry.content:
The tables are still used.

Kind regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: After archive & delete the PO, Need to archive materi...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for reaching out! 

Archiving and deleting Purchase Orders (POs) in SAP does not automatically archive or delete related Material Documents and Invoice Documents. These are separate entities and need to be handled individually.

If a PO is deleted, it means that the PO is flagged for deletion and it will not appear in your regular transaction records.  However, the associated Material Documents and Invoice Documents will not be deleted or archived automatically. They remain in the system until they are manually archived or deleted.

It’s important to note that archiving or deleting Material Documents and Invoice Documents should be done carefully, considering the potential impact on your data integrity and reporting. Before deciding to archive or delete these documents, you should consider whether these documents may still be needed for future reference, reporting, or auditing purposes

Kind Regards, 

Roxana

entry.title: Re: Trying to assign (SAPLFACI)BKPF to a field-symbol
entry.content:
I've done this several times by just calling one of the function modules of the appropriate function group.

However, this has some possible drawbacks: This procedure requires a function module that can be called without any further impact on the current Idoc, so basically a dummy function module would be fine, e.g. one that gives back a value and does not modify any data.

Maybe the FM FI_ACC_GET would be worth looking at to do a dummy call and the function group is  properly initialized afterwards.

But still the question is, if you assign an external variable, you cannot expect that is has some meaningful value in the field symbol.

Because if you have to apply such tricks as above, the global variables in include SAPLFACI won't have any values either, just initial ones.

entry.title: Re: SAC BI Story Calculation Improvements: Running Total - SUM, MAX, MIN, AVERAGE,COUNT
entry.content:
My customer is analyzing its vendors. They want to answer questions like: From my top 5 vendors (in terms of quantity) I get 50% of my total inventory. 

Therefore, they need to 1) rank their vendors in terms of quantity, 2) calculate the cumulative sum along this ranking and 3) calculate running percentages of the cumulative sum / total quantity. 

I can use the calculations in a table to do 1) and 2) but I cannot reuse these calculations in other charts. Can you think of a way to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: How to correct invalid time dependent MD in SAP BW
entry.content: In This document i have provided all details step to correct Time Dependent master data in SAP BW

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right.
entry.content:
We are on S4 HANA 2021 SP 05. 
What is the different between the report RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA vs /SDF/RC_START_CHECK?
/SDF/RC_START_CHECK replace RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA in newer release?
We are not able to find RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA.

Do we need to use SAP Readiness Check - SAP for Me after we run /SDF/RC_START_CHECK? 
From where we can get the archive generate file to be upload for SAP Readiness Check - SAP for Me to analyze?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

I can confirm your findings. Indeed, in the trial cluster, the label namespace is missing. Yesterday, I had tried the tutorial on my standard cluster as my trial cluster was still getting provisioned.

On my trial cluster

❯ k get ns istio-system --show-labels
NAME           STATUS   AGE   LABELS
istio-system   Active   25m   kubernetes.io/metadata.name=istio-system,namespaces.warden.kyma-project.io/validate=enabled

 

On my standard cluster,

❯ k get ns istio-system --show-labels
NAME           STATUS   AGE    LABELS
istio-system   Active   310d   istio-injection=enabled,kubernetes.io/metadata.name=istio-system,name=istio-system,namespaces.warden.kyma-project.io/validate=enabled,reconciler.kyma-project.io/managed-by=reconciler,reconciler.kyma-project.io/origin-version=2.20.0

I will take it as regression to the dev team and get it fixed. We will work on ensuring that trial clusters do not have such diversions.

Thanks for your inputs and detailed analysis.

Gaurav

entry.title: Is it possible to use SNC encryption with CLIENT ENCRYPTION 2.0 and X.509, without SSO or MS AD?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have no MicrosoftAD or SSO component.

Only want to use secure data transport  between GUI and ABAP server, only encryption, self-typed user and password.

GUI version - 8.00 with CLIENT ENCRYPTION 2.0

ABAP server - ERP6 EHP7

 

For Server, a certificate from my colleague is installed into STUST-SNCSAPCryptolib, and show "CN=*.companydns.com, O=xxxxxxxxx,C=xx" . Configurations are done with tcode SNCWIZARD. SAPCRYPTOLIB version is 8.5.47.

For PC, RootCA is separated from certificate and installed.

I get error on GUI "A2200210 Peer certificate verification failed".

Then I find a article. How SNC Client Encryption Works | SAP Help Portal  

There is MS-AD in the structure. 

So i got confused. But, I'm using CLIENT ENCRYPTION 2.0 not 1.0, I'm using X.509 not kerberos. Is MS AD still necessary?  Is it possible to use SNC encryption with CLIENT ENCRYPTION 2.0 and X.509, without SSO or MS AD?

entry.title: Re: Create DataType and Message Type artifact in Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Sui
entry.content:
Hi @radhika_javvaji 

how can we transport those Data- and Messagetypes? There is now download option.

Also renaming should be possible or at least copy and rename.

Best regards

Christian

Hi,

the SCIM API in SAP Datasphere has now been released and is documented here.

Best regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content: I have no an active support agreement with SAP, only the community can help me

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item Check - How to do it right.
entry.content:
Hi Steven,

for the technical Upgrade the Report /SDF/RC_START_CHECK is sufficient, because the program is also executed by the SUM-Process. So if there are no errors detected in /SDF/RC_START_CHECK, you can start the Upgrade.

The Readinesscheck checks and recommends (additional) more business and environmental aspects.

But the program should be in your System.

Hope that helps.

 

Regards

 

Gerald

entry.title: Error When Activating Infoobject 0POSTALCODE - Creation of column view for 0POSTALCODE failed
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I tried to install bi content for object 0POSTALCODE and tried to activate it manually. But the error appears as follows.

For Detail is here :

Creation of column view for 0POSTALCODE failed
EC:2048"column store error: fail to create scenario: [34011] Inconsistent calculation model;calculationNode (90000:DS): ColumnTable
Error while generating column view. Char. 0POSTALCODE will be deactivated
HSD::SAPHANADB:/BI0/9POSTALCODE (t -1) not found (cannot get catalog object),Details (Errors):
- calculationNode (90000:DS): ColumnTable
HSD::SAPHANADB:/BI0/9POSTALCODE (t -1) not found (cannot get catalog object).

entry.title: Re: How to load prospective data using incremental feature
entry.content:
One method may be to load data to a dummy time period (e.g. "#"), and then use a data action to move the data accordingly. 

Have tested and this seems to work:

DATA([d/Date]=PREVIOUS(3,"DAY",TODAY()))=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date]="#")

You could embed within a multi action sequence. E.g. 1) Import step to "#" date (with clear and replace subset on date/version to avoid data debris) 2) Data action to move data to correct date.

entry.title: Sapnote1644457 - Default item category for components in maintenance and service orders not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have set the "Define Default Values for Component Item Categories" in customizing to :

Mat.type = ERSA and Plant to right Plant code.

But still when we add a component to the workorder with that plant code and type ERSA , Still SAP gives an error "Enter an item Category". There is also no user exit used at the moment.

Sap Note : 1644457 - Default item category for components in maintenance and service orders - SAP for Me is already checked of course.

We are on ECC 617 SP26

 

greetings Rob

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you have /PERSONAS/EDITOR_ROLE assigned for your user?
Where are you trying to use Personas? Through "sap/bc/personas" service?

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: House Banks in S/4HANA – Change in SAP’s Approach
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to save house bank account details on NWBC tcode, I have entered all the details but while trying to save the data i am getting error data was not saved again and again. 

Can you help me on this error ?

entry.title: Re: Add Header Text in Basic Date of Supplier Invoice
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for reaching out!

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the layout of the ‘Create Supplier Invoice’ app, including the placement of fields in the ‘Basic Data’ and ‘Details’ sections, is determined by the standard SAP Fiori design. Unfortunately, it’s not possible to move fields between these sections using the ‘Adapt UI’ feature. This feature allows you to personalize the user interface, but it doesn’t support moving fields between different sections of the app.

Kind Regards, 

Roxana

entry.title: Re: RFC Adapter with Z Remote Functions - Getting Exception "Error Getting Function"
entry.content: Hi, We are also facing same issue ,if you resolve above issue ? Please share your experience while resolving above error. Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen...
entry.content: Yes

entry.title: SuccessFactors Data Model and Database structure
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am looking for an information what is precisely the structure of data tables lying underneath of XML based foundation objects in SF on the one side, and MDF based foundation objects on the other side. 

In my understanding, XML based objects have three-like data structure with one to one relation and pretty rigid forms, as for MDF based objects the data structure is relational and more flexible (rows, columns). It would be important for me to understand potential impact in a positive and negative sense. It goes even further if i think on how HANA data base is structured and how SF on hana can use (if at all) the way hana is (or supposed to be) structured (column,  indexing etc.). 

Can somebody please help me out regarding and documentation out there (I could not find nothing in SAP Help Portal or KBAs)? Thanks!

Best regards,

Milos

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide on SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA Migration
entry.content: Very informative. Thank you, Anmol.

entry.title: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
Hello, I am new to CDS, I want to extract data from two tables in a view: EINA and EINE.

For each EINE line we have an EINA line, the reverse is not true.

To do this I use the UNION ALL statement.

My need is very simple, in the EINA table we have the MATNR field, but not in the EINE table, so in my CDS view I would like for each EINE line to take the associated value from EINA.MATNR to my CDS view.

Here is my example code:

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'EINA/EINEE Union'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}

define view entity ZC_EinaEineUnion as select from eina
{
  key eina.infnr,
  'EINA' as TableSource,
   eina.matnr
}
union all select from eine
{
  key eine.infnr,
  'EINE' as TableSource,
  '' as matnr
}

 

When executed it gives:

My need: in the matnr column, I would like to have for all EINE lines the value '000000000007047609'.

Thank you in advance for your help

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!

We also have a contest open right now and everyone is invited to enter!
